title: Pyramid Texts, Utterance 41
description: Utterance 41 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.
introduction: Utterance 41 of the Pyramid Texts — the oldest religious texts in the world.

translation.text: Pyramid Text Utterance 41: an ancient Egyptian funerary spell from the walls of the Pyramid of Unas at Saqqara (~2350 BCE). These are the oldest religious texts in the world. The spells empowered the deceased pharaoh's ascent to join the gods among the imperishable stars. Utterance 41 continues the great cycle of resurrection spells.
